magnitude_spread.note: real spread now — dilution artifact resolved

interpretation: With proper tight-window scoring (dilution resolved), Evo2 STILL does not cluster with the activity-predictor CNNs (AlphaGenome/Borzoi/Enformer, ρ≈0) and does not track the reporter. It measures a DIFFERENT estimand: sequence likelihood/plausibility under a genome LM, not predicted regulatory activity. The one significant correlation (vs Enformer) is tiny and negative. A directional hint toward the endogenous eQTL effect appears only at truly causal variants (PIP≥0.5: ρ=0.36, p=0.07, n=25) but is underpowered.
thesis_impact: SHARPENS rather than bulletproofs: the estimand-mismatch framing extends — not all 'sequence models' share an estimand. The three activity-predictor CNNs cluster; a likelihood LM is a fourth, distinct estimand. Report as a nuance/limitation, NOT as a 4th member of the model cluster.
